info.title: rental-crm-back
info.description: Landlord CRM backend -- record-keeping-first. All clients bind only to this contract.

code.description: Stable, machine-readable code. Clients branch on this; never on message.

get.summary: List areas in an account (filterable by property_id and kind)

post.summary: Create an area (unit or common area)

patch.summary: Update an area (name only; kind is immutable)

get.summary: Get unit-only attributes for an area
List tenancies (filterable by area_id and status)

post.summary: Create a tenancy (on a unit-kind area)

patch.summary: Update a tenancy (status / end_date only; area_id is immutable)

post.summary: Add a tenant to a tenancy with a role

get.summary: List leases (filterable by tenancy_id and status)

post.summary: Create a lease attached to a tenancy
Create an asset attached to an area
Set the end_date on a schedule (history-preserving end)
Void a charge (history-preserving; original row stays visible)
Record a received payment, optionally with allocations
Void a payment (history-preserving; original row stays visible)
Add an allocation against an existing payment

get.summary: Per-tenancy ledger: charges + payments + allocations + derived balances
